passives.name: Eminence
passives.effects: Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them generates a permanent stack and grants you {{as|15|ad}} (+ 2 per stack) {{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}} for 90 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Scoring a {{tip takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them generates a permanent stack and grants you {{as 15 ad}} (+ 2 per stack) {{as '''bonus''' attack damage}} for 90 seconds.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: a takedown only qualifies when the owner damaged that enemy champion within the prior 3 seconds, then Eminence grants one permanent stack and starts a 90-second temporary bonus-attack-damage buff.
Player-visible behavior: each new takedown immediately refreshes temporary bonus attack damage that scales with all permanent Hubris stacks.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (Hubris)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of takedown damage-window gating, permanent-stack accumulation, temporary bonus AD values, and buff duration
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
